items.name_cn:
New Arrival Montaigne Collection💗30 AVENUE 💗
Crafted from blue Oblique fabric with refined rounded corners, featuring a vintage gold-finish metal CD buckle inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle.
The back is embossed with the 30 Montaigne logo, paired with a classic chain made of alternating gold-finish metal and enamel links in the same tone as the leather. The pleated design offers spacious storage and a refined silhouette, suitable for hand-carry, shoulder, or crossbody wear.
✨Small body, big capacity
🌟The CD connection on the chain is more exquisite
Size:22.5*12.5*6.5

items.name_cn:
New Dior ❤️❤️
This Lady Dior handbag is exquisitely designed with a spacious interior. Crafted from white lambskin, it features a woven grid quilting and a "D.I.O.R." charm, showcasing a fashionable and classic charm. The multi-compartment design is practical for various daily items. The chain is embellished with beads, making it easy to carry on the shoulder or crossbody.
Front "D.I.O.R." charm
Flip-top closure
1 exterior compartment
1 interior compartment
1 zip pocket
1 slip pocket
6 card slots
Chain embellished with beads
Made in Italy
Style: 3105
19.5 x 12.5 x 5 cm

items.name_en: New Dior Tote with Linen Embroidery
items.name_cn:
New Dior Tote with Linen Embroidery
Crafted from jute canvas, this Book Tote measures 36.5*28cm. Designed by Dior Women's Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this mainstay piece embodies Dior aesthetics. The medium size features a "CHRISTIAN DIOR PARIS" logo on the front, showcasing Dior's signature craftsmanship, and can be carried by hand or on the shoulder.
Front features "CHRISTIAN DIOR PARIS" logo
Includes dust bag
Made in Italy
Style: 8001

items.name_cn:
New Grey Embroidery 🦋🦋/Colorful Constellation
Designed by Dior Women's Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this Book Tote is a flagship piece embodying Dior aesthetics. Crafted from white fabric and meticulously embellished with the multicolor Rêve d'Infini pattern embroidery designed by artist Pietro Ruffo, it infuses a dreamy element into a classic design, reinterpreting the star symbol beloved by Christian Dior. It can hold various daily essentials. Medium size, featuring the CHRISTIAN DIOR PARIS logo on the front, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship, and can be carried by hand or over the shoulder.
Style: 8001
36 x 27.5 x 16.5 cm
Front featuring CHRISTIAN DIOR PARIS logo
Includes dust bag
Made in Italy

items.name_cn:
New Lady D 🌟 Calfskin Series
This Lady D-Joy handbag interprets Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. An elegant classic style, meticulously crafted from nude pink calfskin, paired with a light gold-finished metal 'D.I.O.R.' charm to elevate the style, adding a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette. Equipped with a removable chain strap and an adjustable, removable leather shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal choice for daily looks.
Size 26cm

items.name_en: New Montaigne 30 Silver Clasp❤️ 'Killing Eve' Bag
items.name_cn:
New Montaigne 30 Silver Clasp❤️ 'Killing Eve' Bag
A very cool silver clasp that gives me a 'Killing Eve' vibe!
I really like this square bag, it looks so classy when worn, giving a cool and capable feel!
Classic embroidered fabric with genuine leather, professional or casual outfits, both are easy to hold!
The chain is detachable.
Size 24*17*8

items.name_en: Original leather with full set of packaging
items.name_cn:
Original leather with full set of packaging
Montaigne Small, in stock!!️
Montaigne Denim Series. I was recommended this bag; it renews the classic letter pattern with irregular stone-washed effects, giving the bag a fresh style. The gradient effect is unique and cool, and the denim print shows off a fashionable charm that looks both premium and visually striking. The size is moderate, perfect for daily outings. The classic shape, iconic letter lock, and exquisite chain strap combine modernity and elegance, a perfect fusion of retro and fashion.
size:21*6*12cm
